title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

title: Raazi
desc: Sehmat Khan, an undercover RAW agent, is married into a Pakistani family by her father, enabling her to infiltrate and extract intelligence on enemy operations.

title: Half Girlfriend
desc: Madhav Jha, a student from Bihar, joins a Delhi college and falls for Riya Somani. He tries to make her his girlfriend, but she isn't interested in him romantically.

title: Ghayal Once Again
desc: Ajay Mehra establishes a newspaper and becomes an influential investigative journalist, leading four teenagers in a dangerous quest for truth against powerful adversaries.

desc: Amir, a young man, tries to dodge the police after they raid one of his drug dealings. The situation becomes more complicated when his sister gets imprisoned while trying to save him.

title: Fateh
desc: Fateh, an ex-gangster, protects Khushi from threats, utilizing his skills to ensure her safety. He investigates the origins of these dangers while on duty.

title: Jazbaa
desc: Anuradha, a fearless lawyer, faces a nightmare when kidnappers demand she defends a rapist to save her daughter's life. Will she surrender?

title: Mantra
desc: A professor decides to buy an allegedly haunted ancestral property on the condition that someone stays there. A local goon spends three months in the house in a bid to earn a quick profit.
